content.text:
I reviewed all three migration paths.

- Option A (blue/green): lowest risk, highest infra cost, roughly two days of engineering time.
- Option B (rolling): moderate risk, no extra infra cost, roughly one day of engineering time, brief error-rate blip expected during cutover.
- Option C (big-bang): highest risk, zero extra cost, half a day of engineering time, requires a maintenance window.

Given the current traffic pattern and the team's on-call coverage this week, B is the strongest fit overall. Would you like me to proceed with the deployment?
